text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the race begins, Seiun Sky thanks King
Halo for helping her out of her funk.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the paddock, she then makes her first
declaration of war to Special Week. The big three
are set to face off once more!
